name: Mesquite Grilled Cumin-And-Lime-Marinated Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine cumin, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, salt and pepper.
2. Place chicken in a large bowl. Pour marinade over chicken, mix well, cover, and marinate in refrigerator 1 hour.
3. Grill chicken breasts over mesquite chips until fully cooked but not dry.
4. To serve, place relish in the center of each of 4 plates. Slice chicken breasts at an angle and arrange slices around the relish on each plate. Garnish with cilantro sprigs.
RELISH:
1. Roast corn in the husks on hot grill, turning occasionally, until tender, about 15 minutes. Remove from grill and set aside until cool enough to handle.
2. Remove husks and cut kernels from cobs (you should have 2 cups).
3. Heat oil in skillet. Add corn and chopped cilantro; saute 1 minute. Stir in beans. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
